description: Google Cloud Application Integration is an integration-platform service for building and running application workflows and connectors across Google Cloud and third-party systems. The `integrations.googleapis.com` host serves its management and execution REST API for Application Integration resources.
summary: integrations.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud Application Integration REST API authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens; no GraphQL, MCP server, or standalone CLI specific to this domain were found.
